title: Afterlife / above-below ~
message: So then Carlos tried the back door of the red giant rickrolling ball. "And shall everyone escape not" Carlos cried in sorrow. Just figuring out the equation to the notepad was just a suggestion of a world filled of blank. "WE TRIED, IT WAS MELTING" said in sorrow the giant, big, red sun. Shall the light be darkened by 40%? The sun asked. But ever wondered how they escaped—rather the fact you should be asking is, "What is above and below where they are." In no place shall they ever morn to fire in the darkest places of depart and rejoice. Kid yelled the sun, yielding a ton of energy. But Carlos cannot speak. Then the sun was lost. The earthians—earth people who made more then and other then 900 comics—said: "This is getting about-". Blobby as they felt like a dream. Surfactant in darkness. Nah. As they walked in pressure as tough as metal fused into your ski~
